name: Low-Fat French Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: Lemon zest (from the rind of 1 lemon)
2 Tart apples (e.g., Granny Smith), peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake the pie crust according to recipe instructions. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, simmer applesauce, honey, brandy (if desired), vanilla extract, and lemon zest for about 10 to 15 minutes until quite thick.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Arrange apple slices in concentric circles on top of the sauce.
6. In a 1-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, melt apricot jam. Use a pastry brush to glaze the apples with the jam.
7. Bake for 30 minutes. Let cool before slicing.
